statuses.LIVE: Usable now with tested or clearly exposed functionality.
statuses.PREVIEW: Visible and informative, but not yet production-complete.
statuses.SCAFFOLD: Public shell exists, but the workflow is still thin or mocked.
statuses.PLANNED: Documented only; not yet available as a working operator surface.

apps.title: Georeference Map
apps.summary: Upload map context, identify control points, and move toward governed georeferencing.
apps.notes: Core pathway exists, but public operator UX still needs deepening.

apps.title: Seismic Vision Review
apps.summary: Single-line review surface for governed seismic interpretation with explicit humility about mock backends.

apps.title: Attribute Audit
apps.summary: Inspect extracted seismic attributes and transform-chain notes before interpretation.
apps.notes: Partial operator UI is now exposed, but not yet a full production workflow.

apps.title: AC_Risk Console
apps.summary: Evaluate anomalous contrast risk across physical uncertainty, transform distortion, and cognitive bias.
apps.notes: This is the strongest public operator surface today.

apps.title: Analog Digitizer
apps.summary: Future workflow for tracing analog logs into governed digital outputs.
